_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: In RHT92 xenograft model, AAV-K55-GRDC24 also markedly slowed down the tumor growth, and adding a second dose made a more substantial response
details: AAV-K55-GRDC24 markedly slowed down RHT92 tumor growth, with more substantial response when adding a second dose (n=4-5 mice)
